title: The Weapons of Mass Destruction and their Delivery Systems (Prohibition of Unlawful Activities) Act, 2005
full_text: The Weapons of Mass Destruction and their Delivery Systems (Prohibition of Unlawful Activities) Act, 2005 सामूहिक संहार के आयुध और उनकी परिदान प्रणाली (विधिविरुद्ध क्रियाकलापों का प्रतिषेध)अधिनियम, 2005 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 200521 Act Number: 21 Enactment Date: 2005-06-06 Act Year: 2005 Short Title: The Weapons of Mass Destruction and their Delivery Systems (Prohibition of Unlawful Activities) Act, 2005 Hindi Title: सामूहिक संहार के आयुध और उनकी परिदान प्रणाली (विधिविरुद्ध क्रियाकलापों का प्रतिषेध)अधिनियम, 2005 Long Title: An Act to prohibit unlawful activities, in relation to weapons of mass destruction and their delivery systems and for matters connected therewith or incidental thereto. Ministry: Ministry of External Affairs Enforcement Date: 17-11-2006 Notification: 17th November, 2006, vide notification No. S.O. 1990(E), dated 17th November, 2006, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii).
